description: A surgery scheduler needs to obtain preauthorization from a patient's insurance company for a scheduled procedure.

nodes.task_description: Verify clinician access and patient identity.
Identify the patient, their insurance, and the CPT code for the planned surgery.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gathers all necessary information for the authorization request.

nodes.task_description: Submit the preauthorization request to the payer through their provider portal, attaching relevant clinical documentation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully submits the request with supporting documents.

nodes.task_description: Receive and document the authorization number in the patient's record.

expected_outcome.value: Agent receives an approval and enters the authorization number into the EHR, clearing the procedure for billing.
